description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly yellow and green design, featuring the brand 'BRAVO Eko.' and the product name 'Tropisk Juice' on the front. The packaging is decorated with vibrant illustrations of tropical fruits, including pineapples and oranges, suggesting a tropical juice blend. The carton has a white screw cap located on the top, slightly offset to one side, which serves as the opening mechanism. The sides of the carton are similarly decorated, while the back is plain with a light green top and white body, lacking any branding or fruit illustrations. The overall surface appears to be made of laminated cardboard, giving it a semi-glossy, smooth finish. The object is typical of single-serving or family-sized juice cartons found in urban environments such as convenience stores, parks, or recycling bins.
description: A colorful, rectangular juice carton with tropical fruit illustrations, a white screw cap, and the 'BRAVO Eko.' brand label. The surface is smooth and semi-glossy, typical of laminated cardboard packaging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'BRAVO Eko.' label, 'Tropisk Juice' text, fruit illustrations, and the white screw cap on top.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view, revealing the cap's position and the continuation of the fruit illustrations on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view, displaying a plain light green and white surface with no branding or illustrations.
description_view_3: Angled front-right view, again showing the cap and fruit illustrations, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side.
